name: standupcrossfit
description: StandUp CrossFit - run backend (.NET API) and frontend (Vite) together

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && DOTNET_ROLL_FORWARD=Major ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://localhost:5050 dotnet watch run
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && DOTNET_ROLL_FORWARD=Major ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet ef database update
scripts.db:update: cd backend && DOTNET_ROLL_FORWARD=Major ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet ef database update
